ACTION_SYSTEM: Intimate the CE to redo the mandate.
ACTION_CE: Talk to the customer and redo the mandate.

FAILURE_REASON: Balance Insufficient / Insufficient Funds in the Account or Overdraft Account
ACTION_CE: Talk to the customer and ensure the correct authentication details are entered.

FAILURE_REASON: Customer to refer to the branch
ACTION_CE: Nudge the customer to reach out to the bank to understand the blocker. Customer to take necessary action.

Talk to the customer and request unblocking the account. Then retry. (IF can't be fixed, collect manually). IF can be rectified for the same payment mode next month - No Action, Else - Follow up to change the payment mode. IF can't be rectified - Move to Manual after approval (or) Mark as Inactive.
Talk to the customer and ensure the correct authentication details are entered.
Nudge the customer to reach out to the bank to understand the blocker. Customer to take necessary action.

FAILURE_REASON: Pre-Debit Notification Failed Due to MMS API Failure
ACTION_SYSTEM: Notify Cashfree within 7 days of the transaction
ACTION_CE: Flag the issue to tech team
